atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports acne on the face.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that the acne started about two years ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports acne is present most every day.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient uses Persa-gel.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient washes regularly.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Multiple benign nevi were observed on the trunk and extremities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Scattered skin-colored papules, open and closed comedones, and erythrema papules were noted on the face.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The chest and back are relatively spared.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports greasy skin in the morning.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient uses Elf facial cleanser in the morning.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient uses Elf facial cleanser called the super clarity cleanser at night.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that his acne flares with his periods.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that his acne is not really affected by his periods.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a mild cleanser for morning face washing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a moisturizer labeled 'noncomedogenic' with SPF 30 or higher.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes sunscreen SPF 30 or higher.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes adapalene 0.1% cream.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a gel over the counter as an alternative to adapalene if it is expensive or not covered by insurance.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes Clean & Clear Persa-gel.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports acne.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a follow-up appointment in six months.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician notes that adapalene may cause sensitivity.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician notes that adapalene may cause dryness or irritation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to wear sunscreen when outside due to the atopic retinoid.
